author: @romeliapolly2520
text: Go to inplix page if you'd like to know how to build it. Great solutions for everyone I think

author: @ThinkingandTinkering
text: Hi - sorry about the delay in replying - i have been away - the motor is an 240volt ac motor pulled from a belt sander. I cut away most of the extra bits of casing and used it 'as is'. I talk about the motor a bit more fully in an earlier video - hope this helps.
